item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 27min “It makes you feel great. You’ve got rid of the sluggishness. I’m going to continue doing it.
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 27min “It makes you feel great. You’ve got rid of the sluggishness. I’m going to continue doing it. I’ve dropped six kg in weight.”
Alan Soutar on running transforming his darts game.
